ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "class_number" INTEGER /* Class number of the course */,
  "mnemonic" TEXT /* Mnemonic of the course (e.g., AAS, AMST) */,
  "number" INTEGER /* Number of the course */,
  "section" INTEGER /* Section number of the course */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the course (e.g., Lecture, Seminar, Workshop) */,
  "units" INTEGER /* Number of units the course is worth */,
  "enrollment_limit" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students that can enroll in the course */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department offering the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisite courses for the course */,
  "course_level" TEXT /* Level of the course (e.g., undergraduate, graduate) */,
  "syllabus" TEXT /* Syllabus for the course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the course was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the instructor belongs to */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the instructor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the instructor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instructor was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the instructor's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_instructors" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the instructor in the course (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instructor was assigned to the course */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id", "instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rooms" (
  "room_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each room */,
  "building" TEXT /* Building where the room is located */,
  "room_number" TEXT /* Number of the room */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the room */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the room was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the room's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("room_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_schedule" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "room_id" INTEGER /* ID of the room */,
  "days" TEXT /* Days of the week the course is held */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the course */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the course */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the course */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the schedule was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the schedule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id", "room_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the course */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade of the student in the course */,
  "dropout_date" TEXT /* Date the student dropped out of the course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the enrollment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the enrollment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id", "student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the student (e.g., freshman, sophomore) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the student was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the student's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the department was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the department's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_departments" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the department was linked to the course */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the link */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id", "department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "waitlists" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "waitlist_date" TEXT /* Date the student was added to the waitlist */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the student on the waitlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the student was added to the waitlist */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the waitlist entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id", "student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_topics" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic covered in the course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the topic was added to the course */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id", "topic")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_descriptions" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the description was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the description */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_status" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the course (e.g., Open, Closed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status was set */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollment_status" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "enrollment" INTEGER /* Number of students currently enrolled in the course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the enrollment status was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the enrollment status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "waitlist_status" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "waitlist" INTEGER /* Number of students currently on the waitlist for the course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the waitlist status was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the waitlist status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)
